addon.name: Takes for Blender
addon.tagline: Manage Scenes, Actions, and Render Variations

operators.name: TKS_OT_AcceptPresetProperty
operators.bl_description:
Save this value into the preset.
ALT+Click: save and sync to all scenes using this preset

operators.name: TKS_OT_AssignExistingAction
operators.bl_description: Pick an existing Action to assign

operators.name: TKS_OT_BatchRender
operators.bl_description: Render remaining enabled View Layers (Alt+Click to force render all)

operators.name: TKS_OT_BatchRenderBG
operators.bl_description: Render remaining enabled View Layers in background. Alt+Click to force render all

operators.name: TKS_OT_BrowseDirectory
operators.bl_description: Open file browser to select output directory

operators.name: TKS_OT_CalibrateRenderTimes
operators.bl_description: Spawn a headless Blender that probe-renders each queued view layer at a tiny resolution and extrapolates to the real settings. Foreground stays responsive; ETAs update per-row as results land

operators.name: TKS_OT_CleanEmpty
operators.bl_description: Delete empty slots, then delete actions that become empty. Respects the inspector's filters; preserves bound slots, fake-user-protected actions, and cascade-bound actions

operators.name: TKS_OT_CleanEmptyActions
operators.bl_description: Delete actions visible in the current list that contain no slots. Fake-user-protected actions and actions referenced by any cascade tier are preserved

operators.name: TKS_OT_CleanEmptySlots
operators.bl_description: Delete empty slots visible in the current list (respects action and name filters). Slots currently assigned to a datablock are preserved

operators.name: TKS_OT_ClearPycache
operators.bl_description: Delete all __pycache__ folders (forces fresh bytecode on next restart)

operators.name: TKS_OT_ConvertToOverride
operators.bl_description: Show information about linked objects needing library overrides

operators.name: TKS_OT_CopySlotKeys
operators.bl_description: Copy all keyframes from the selected slot to clipboard

operators.name: TKS_OT_CopySyntax
operators.bl_description: Copy this token to clipboard

operators.name: TKS_OT_CreateRenderPreset
operators.bl_description: Create a new preset from current render settings

operators.name: TKS_OT_DeleteRenderPreset
operators.bl_description: Permanently delete this preset file

operators.name: TKS_OT_DeleteSlot
operators.bl_description: Permanently delete selected slots from their actions

operators.name: TKS_OT_EditRenderPreset
operators.bl_description: Rename or relocate this preset

operators.name: TKS_OT_FindActionSlot
operators.bl_description: Find and select the action and slot for a datablock. Alt+Click for Scene/World

operators.name: TKS_OT_ManageOrphanedSettings
operators.bl_description: View and remove orphaned properties from this preset

operators.name: TKS_OT_OpenAddonPrefs
operators.bl_description:
Open addon preferences

[Alt + Click] Toggle Process Monitor

operators.name: TKS_OT_OpenDocumentation
operators.bl_description: Open addon documentation

operators.name: TKS_OT_PasteSlotKeys
operators.bl_description: Paste copied keyframes into the selected slot (replaces existing)

operators.name: TKS_OT_PresetLockedInfo
operators.bl_description:
Shared folder is locked.

Unlock it in Addon Preferences to save changes.

operators.name: TKS_OT_PreviewRender
operators.bl_description: Open the rendered image for this ViewLayer (Alt+Click)

operators.name: TKS_OT_PreviewSound
operators.bl_description: Play the selected notification sound

operators.name: TKS_OT_ReassignSlot
operators.bl_description: Find and reassign the matching existing slot

operators.name: TKS_OT_RefreshAllPreviews
operators.bl_description: Reload all VL preview thumbnails from rendered output

operators.name: TKS_OT_RefreshTree
operators.bl_description: Rebuild groups and sync the Takes tree

operators.name: TKS_OT_RenameSlot
operators.bl_description: Rename slot to token name. Alt+Click: rename all matching slots across all actions

operators.name: TKS_OT_RenameSlotMismatches
operators.bl_description: Rename every mismatched slot to its target's expected name (per-target, safe for shared default names like SOLO_Nodes)

operators.name: TKS_OT_RenderActiveVL
operators.bl_description: Render only the active View Layer

operators.name: TKS_OT_RenderAllPreviews
operators.bl_description:
Render preview for the active View Layer.
Alt+Click: render all View Layers

operators.name: TKS_OT_RenderAllPreviewsBG
operators.bl_description:
Render preview for the active View Layer in background.
Alt+Click: render all View Layers

operators.name: TKS_OT_ResetDirectory
operators.bl_description: Reset field to default value

operators.name: TKS_OT_ResetPieHotkey
operators.bl_description: Reset hotkey to default

operators.name: TKS_OT_ResetSoundFolder
operators.bl_description: Clear custom sound directory and reset Success/Failed sounds to bundled defaults

operators.name: TKS_OT_RevertAllPresets
operators.bl_description:
Restore all presets to their saved values.
ALT+Click: revert and sync to all scenes using these presets

operators.name: TKS_OT_RevertPresetProperty
operators.bl_description:
Restore preset value for this property.
ALT+Click: revert and sync to all scenes using this preset

operators.name: TKS_OT_RevertToPreset
operators.bl_description:
Discard changes, restore preset values.
ALT+Click: revert and sync to all scenes using this preset

operators.name: TKS_OT_SaveAllDirtyPresets
operators.bl_description:
Save all changed presets.
ALT+Click: save and sync to all scenes using these presets

operators.name: TKS_OT_SelectPreset
operators.bl_description: Select this preset

operators.name: TKS_OT_SoundInfo
operators.bl_description: Only .wav files are supported for completion sounds

operators.name: TKS_OT_StripInvalidTokens
operators.bl_description: Strip tokens that are not valid for each template

operators.name: TKS_OT_SyncBrackets
operators.bl_description: Convert tokens in this field to the current bracket style

operators.name: TKS_OT_SyncTreeToPrefs
operators.bl_description: Save current tree settings as your default preferences

operators.name: TKS_OT_SyntaxCheatSheetPopover
operators.bl_description: Show available tokens for Smart Output paths

operators.name: TKS_OT_ToggleLogTopic
operators.bl_description: Toggle topic. Shift+Click: Select All subtopics. Alt+Click: Invert subtopics.

operators.name: TKS_OT_UnassignSlot
operators.bl_description: Un-assign the action slot

operators.name: TKS_OT_UnassignSlotless
operators.bl_description: Remove action assignments from objects that have no matching slot (stale assignments)

operators.name: TKS_OT_UpdateRenderPreset
operators.bl_description:
Save current settings to preset.
ALT+Click: save and sync to all scenes using this preset

operators.name: TKS_OT_VLPreviewPick
operators.bl_description: Choose a custom preview image for this View Layer

operators.name: TKS_OT_VSW_ApplyVariant
operators.bl_description: Apply the selected variant's pool materials

preferences.name: auto_assign_vl_actions
preferences.label: Auto-assign ViewLayer Actions
preferences.description: Automatically rename and assign Blender's default actions to the cascade hierarchy when keyframing. When disabled, actions keep their default names

preferences.name: auto_clear_world_when_unassigned
preferences.label: Auto-clear World when Unassigned
preferences.description: Automatically clear the Scene's World when no World is assigned anywhere in the Takes tree. When disabled, the existing Scene World is preserved so you can manage it manually outside the cascade

preferences.name: auto_create_reference_action
preferences.label: Auto-create Reference Action
preferences.description: Automatically create a Reference State action when keyframing. When disabled, you must create it manually

preferences.name: auto_fake_user_actions
preferences.label: Auto Fake User on Actions
preferences.description: Automatically set Fake User on all actions to prevent Blender from garbage-collecting them on save/reload

preferences.name: auto_mirror_keyframes
preferences.label: Auto-mirror Keyframes to Reference
preferences.description: Automatically mirror new keyframes into the Reference Action. Disable to prevent the addon from modifying Reference State baselines

preferences.name: auto_rename_actions
preferences.label: Auto-rename Actions on Hierarchy Change
preferences.description: Automatically rename cascade-assigned actions when their parent hierarchy is renamed (Scene, VL, Groups, Versions)

preferences.name: auto_rename_previews
preferences.label: Auto-rename Thumbnails on Name Change
preferences.description: Automatically rename preview thumbnails when a Scene or View Layer is renamed. When disabled, a warning is shown instead

preferences.name: auto_rename_slots
preferences.label: Auto-rename Slots on Target Rename
preferences.description: Automatically rename action slots when the target object, material, or other datablock is renamed

preferences.name: auto_snap_on_clear
preferences.label: Auto-snap on Keyframe Clear
preferences.description: Automatically snap unkeyed properties to Reference State values when keyframes are deleted. When disabled, use the manual Snap to Reference button

preferences.name: preset_change_mode
preferences.label: Preset Changes
preferences.description: How to handle render preset value changes

items.label: Manual
items.description: Show a warning when Render, Output, or Camera settings differ from their preset. Accept, Revert, or Sync each change individually

items.label: Drop & Re-apply
items.description: Discard any manual changes and restore the preset values automatically. Settings always match the saved preset

items.label: Always Sync
items.description: Save every change to the preset and apply it to all scenes that share the same preset

preferences.name: confirm_batch_operations
preferences.label: Batch Operations
preferences.description: Confirm before starting a Batch Render. Found in: Batch Render tab

preferences.name: confirm_clean_empty
preferences.label: Clean Empty Slots/Actions
preferences.description: Show a preview dialog before bulk-removing empty slots and/or actions. Found in: Inspector tab (list menus)

preferences.name: confirm_delete_action
preferences.label: Delete Action
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting an Action. Found in: Inspector tab

preferences.name: confirm_delete_bookmark
preferences.label: Delete Bookmark
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting a Bookmark. Found in: Library mode

preferences.name: confirm_delete_group
preferences.label: Delete Group
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting a Group from the Split View lists. Found in: Context tab (Tree)

preferences.name: confirm_delete_keyframe
preferences.label: Delete Keyframe
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting a Keyframe. Found in: Inspector tab

preferences.name: confirm_delete_scene
preferences.label: Delete Scene
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting a Scene from the Split View lists. Found in: Context tab (Tree)

preferences.name: confirm_delete_scene_group
preferences.label: Delete Scene Group
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting a Scene Group from the Split View lists. Found in: Context tab (Tree)

preferences.name: confirm_delete_slot
preferences.label: Delete Slot
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting a Slot. Found in: Inspector tab

preferences.name: confirm_delete_tag
preferences.label: Delete Tag
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting a Tag. Found in: Library mode

preferences.name: confirm_delete_tree_item
preferences.label: Delete Tree Item
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting an item in the unified Tree View or via the global DEL/X hotkey. Found in: Context tab (Tree)

preferences.name: confirm_delete_variant
preferences.label: Delete Variant
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting a Variant. Found in: Library mode

preferences.name: confirm_delete_version
preferences.label: Delete Version
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting a Scene Version from the Split View lists. Found in: Context tab (Tree)

preferences.name: confirm_delete_viewlayer
preferences.label: Delete View Layer
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting a View Layer from the Split View lists. Found in: Context tab (Tree)

preferences.name: confirm_delete_vl_group
preferences.label: Delete View Layer Group
preferences.description: Confirm before deleting a View Layer Group from the Split View lists. Found in: Context tab (Tree)

preferences.name: confirm_locked_take_protection
preferences.label: Locked Take Protection
preferences.description: Confirm before modifying ViewLayers that have been explicitly locked. Found in: Global safety guard

preferences.name: confirm_orphan_cleanup
preferences.label: Orphan Cleanup
preferences.description: Confirm before cleaning up unused addon data. Found in: System utility

preferences.name: confirm_override_persistence
preferences.label: Override Persistence
preferences.description: Confirm when overriding property persistence rules. Found in: System utility

preferences.name: confirm_pinned_object_protection
preferences.label: Pinned Object Protection
preferences.description: Confirm before modifying objects that are pinned to a specific Reference State. Found in: Global safety guard

preferences.name: confirm_ref_state_protection
preferences.label: Reference State Protection
preferences.description: Confirm before modifying properties guarded by the Reference State (frame 0). Found in: Global safety guard

preferences.name: confirm_remove_watchlist
preferences.label: Remove from Watchlist
preferences.description: Confirm before removing an item from the Watchlist. Found in: Inspector tab

preferences.name: confirm_rename_action
preferences.label: Rename Action
preferences.description: Confirm before renaming an Action. Found in: Inspector tab

preferences.name: confirm_render_overwrite
preferences.label: Render Overwrite
preferences.description: Confirm before overwriting existing files during render. Found in: Batch Render tab

preferences.name: confirm_shared_resource_safety
preferences.label: Shared Resource Safety
preferences.description: Confirm before modifying shared render presets or library resources. Found in: Global safety guard

preferences.name: confirm_shortcut_override
preferences.label: Shortcut Override
preferences.description: Confirm before resetting global hotkeys to defaults. Found in: System utility

preferences.name: f12_pie_slot_e
preferences.label: East

preferences.name: f12_pie_slot_n
preferences.label: North

preferences.label: North-East

preferences.label: South

preferences.name: keyframe_alt_pie_enabled
preferences.label: Enable Clear Pie (Alt+I)
preferences.description: Replace Alt+I with a Takes-aware pie focused on clearing keyframes and reference-state entries. Same per-editor scope as the I-pie; slot contents are configurable below

preferences.name: keyframe_pie_enabled
preferences.label: Enable Keyframe Pie
preferences.description: Replace the I keyboard shortcut with a Takes-aware pie menu in the selected editors. Slot contents are configurable below. Editors left disabled keep their native I behaviour

preferences.name: keyframe_pie_in_clip_editor
preferences.label: Movie Clip Editor
preferences.description: Show the keyframe pies on I / Alt+I in the Movie Clip Editor

preferences.name: keyframe_pie_in_dopesheet
preferences.label: Dope Sheet
preferences.description: Show the keyframe pies on I / Alt+I in the Dope Sheet

preferences.name: keyframe_pie_in_graph_editor
preferences.label: Graph Editor
preferences.description: Show the keyframe pies on I / Alt+I in the Graph Editor

preferences.name: keyframe_pie_in_image_editor
preferences.label: Image Editor
preferences.description: Show the keyframe pies on I / Alt+I in the Image Editor. Pie only opens when the cursor is over a keyframable value

preferences.name: keyframe_pie_in_nla_editor
preferences.label: NLA Editor
preferences.description: Show the keyframe pies on I / Alt+I in the NLA Editor

preferences.name: keyframe_pie_in_outliner
preferences.label: Outliner
preferences.description: Show the keyframe pies on I / Alt+I in the Outliner

preferences.name: keyframe_pie_in_properties
preferences.label: Properties Editor
preferences.description: Show the keyframe pies on I / Alt+I in the Properties editor. Replaces the per-property keyframe-insert gesture (hover + I)

preferences.name: keyframe_pie_in_sequencer
preferences.label: Video Sequencer
preferences.description: Show the keyframe pies on I / Alt+I in the Video Sequencer

preferences.name: keyframe_pie_in_shader_editor
preferences.label: Shader Editor
preferences.description: Show the keyframe pies on I / Alt+I in the Shader / Node Editor. Pie only opens when the cursor is over a keyframable node value

preferences.name: keyframe_pie_in_view3d
preferences.label: 3D Viewport
preferences.description: Show the keyframe pies on I / Alt+I in the 3D Viewport

preferences.name: default_active_vl_color
preferences.label: Active ViewLayer Color
preferences.description: Default color indicator shown next to the active ViewLayer

preferences.name: default_collapse_mode
preferences.label: Collapse Mode
preferences.description: Default collapse mode for cascade icons

items.label: Dynamic
items.description: Collapse only when the panel is too narrow

items.label: Always
items.description: Always show the compact overflow button

preferences.name: default_collapse_width
preferences.label: Collapse Width
preferences.description: Default panel width (px) below which cascade icons collapse

preferences.name: default_tree_line_color
preferences.label: Tree Line Color
preferences.description: Default color for tree indent strips when no tag is assigned

preferences.name: default_tree_line_width
preferences.label: Tree Line Width
preferences.description: Default width for tree indent color strips

items.label: Medium
items.description: Better visibility at small UI scales

items.label: Wide
items.description: High visibility at any UI scale

preferences.name: debug_log_filename
preferences.label: Log Filename
preferences.description: Base filename for the log. Auto-appended with _YYYY-MM-DD

preferences.name: debug_log_path
preferences.label: Log Directory
preferences.description: Custom folder path for logs. Leave empty to use Blender preset folder

preferences.name: enable_debug_logging
preferences.label: Enable Debug Logging
preferences.description: Write extensive logs to a file to help trace crashes

preferences.name: log_level_debug
preferences.label: Debug
preferences.description: Log trace-level diagnostics

preferences.name: log_level_error
preferences.label: Error
preferences.description: Log errors

preferences.name: log_level_info
preferences.label: Info
preferences.description: Log status updates and event notifications

preferences.name: log_level_warning
preferences.label: Warning
preferences.description: Log warnings

preferences.name: tks_log_to_console
preferences.label: Print to Console
preferences.description: Also print debug log messages to the Blender System Console

preferences.name: auto_restart_dead_processes
preferences.label: Auto-Restart Dead Processes
preferences.description: Automatically restart dead timers when the watchdog detects them

preferences.name: autosave_preferences
preferences.label: Autosave Preferences
preferences.description: Automatically save preferences when any setting changes

preferences.name: enable_auto_migration
preferences.label: Auto-migrate on File Load
preferences.description: Automatically apply data migrations when opening old files. When disabled, a notification is shown instead

preferences.name: enable_render_sounds
preferences.label: Enable Render Sounds
preferences.description: Master toggle for render completion sounds. Per-source toggles below decide which render flows play

preferences.name: f12_pie_menu_enabled
preferences.label: F12 Render Pie Menu
preferences.description: Replace native F12 with a pie menu that lets you choose the render scope (Current VL / Active in scene / Active across all scenes / All in scene / All across all scenes). Off by default — leaves F12 native

preferences.name: navigation_pie_enabled
preferences.label: Navigation Pie Menu
preferences.description: Enable the Ctrl+Shift+C pie menu for quick N-panel tab switching

preferences.name: smart_output_apply_to_f12
preferences.label: F12 respects Standard/Compositor toggles
preferences.description: When OFF (default): F12 / Ctrl+F12 use Blender's native render behavior — literal filepath, no token resolution, all outputs fire. When ON: F12 / Ctrl+F12 use Smart Output — path tokens like [scene] and [view_layer] are resolved, and the 'Standard Output' and 'Compositor Output' checkboxes in the Smart Output panel are obeyed. Batch renders use Smart Output regardless of this setting

preferences.name: smart_output_bracket_style
preferences.label: Syntax Brackets
preferences.description: Bracket style for Smart Output tokens

preferences.name: smart_output_default_directory
preferences.label: Default Directory
preferences.description: Default directory pattern for Smart Output reset button

preferences.name: smart_output_default_filename
preferences.label: Default Filename
preferences.description: Default filename pattern for Smart Output reset button

preferences.name: sound_directory
preferences.label: Sound Folder
preferences.description: Folder containing custom .wav files. Leave empty to use bundled default sounds.

preferences.name: sound_file_failed
preferences.label: Failed Sound
preferences.description: Sound to play when rendering fails or is cancelled

preferences.name: sound_file_success
preferences.label: Success Sound
preferences.description: Sound to play when rendering successfully completes

preferences.name: sound_for_active_vl
preferences.label: Active View Layer
preferences.description: Play sound after the Render Active View Layer operator finishes

preferences.name: sound_for_background
preferences.label: Background Batch
preferences.description: Play sound after a background (subprocess) batch render finishes

preferences.name: sound_for_ctrl_click
preferences.label: Ctrl+Click on Render Icon
preferences.description: Play sound after a single-VL Ctrl+Click render finishes

preferences.name: sound_for_foreground
preferences.label: Foreground Batch
preferences.description: Play sound after a foreground batch render finishes

preferences.name: sound_for_native_f12
preferences.label: F12 / Ctrl+F12 (Native)
preferences.description: Play sound after Blender's built-in F12 / Ctrl+F12 render finishes (any render not started by Takes operators)

preferences.name: sound_for_preview
preferences.label: Preview Thumbnails
preferences.description: Play sound after a preview/thumbnail batch render finishes

preferences.name: naming_global_action_template
preferences.label: Global Action
preferences.description: Template for Global Action names. Tokens: {index}, {sep}

preferences.name: naming_global_camera_template
preferences.label: Global Camera
preferences.description: Template for Global Camera names. Tokens: {index}, {sep}

preferences.name: naming_global_compositor_template
preferences.label: Global Compositor
preferences.description: Template for Global Compositor names. Tokens: {index}, {sep}

preferences.name: naming_preset_camera_template
preferences.label: Camera Preset
preferences.description: Template for Camera preset names. Tokens: {scene}, {camera}, {sep}

preferences.name: naming_preset_colormanagement_template
preferences.label: Color Mgmt Preset

preferences.name: presets_shared_lock
preferences.label: Lock Shared Folder

preferences.name: undo_cascade_token_refire
preferences.label: Cascade-Token Boundary Refire
preferences.description: Re-fire the unified VL-switch snap path when undo/redo crosses a forward cascade boundary (tracked via `scene['tks_cascade_token']`). Disabling this leaves the state after a cross-VL undo at stale ref-cache values

preferences.name: undo_post_ping
preferences.label: Post-Undo Cascade Rebuild (Ping)
preferences.description: Re-attach the cascade tier within ~20 ms when Ctrl+Z lands on Blender's intermediate autokey snapshot. Without it, the object appears stuck at its keyframed position with no action assigned after Ctrl+Z (drag-and-cancel workaround still available)

preferences.name: undo_recovery_windows
preferences.label: Mutation Queue Recovery Windows
preferences.description: Gate `bpy.ops.ed.undo_push('Takes Auto-Merge')` from the mutation queue during post-undo, VL-switch, and autokey settling periods. Disabling this re-introduces phantom 'Takes Auto-Merge' undo steps — every Ctrl+Z forces 5–8 extra presses to walk past the cascade chain reactions

preferences.name: undo_skip_action
preferences.label: Skip ACTION in Post-Undo Cascade
preferences.description: Pass `skip_action=True` to `apply_overrides` in the post-undo deferred cascade. Disabling this lets the cascade read the empty cascade tier at Blender's intermediate snapshot and clear the action that was just restored — the watched object loses its action on every Ctrl+Z

preferences.name: undo_skip_world_clear
preferences.label: Skip World-Clear in Post-Undo Cascade
preferences.description: Pass `skip_world_clear=True` to `apply_overrides` in the post-undo deferred cascade. Without it, undoing back to a state where no world is assigned in the cascade tree wipes `scene.world` — even if the user had manually assigned it outside the tree. Independent of `auto_clear_world_when_unassigned`, which governs normal (non-undo) cascade runs

preferences.name: undo_smart_hijack
preferences.label: Smart Undo / Redo Hijack
preferences.description: Replace Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Shift+Z with Takes-aware operators that collapse a two-snapshot autokey gesture into a single keypress. Without it, one autokey gesture takes two Ctrl+Z presses to fully revert (value step + action step). Disable if it conflicts with other addons that also intercept undo

preferences.name: undo_snap_suppression
preferences.label: Ref-State Snap Suppression
preferences.description: Block ref-state snap-back during the 1 s post-undo grace window. Disabling this lets the snap path overwrite Blender's restored unkeyed transforms during the cascade settling period

preferences.name: undo_strategies_unlocked
preferences.label: Unlock Advanced Undo Overrides
preferences.description: Unlock the four required core strategies for editing. Disabling any of them causes known bugs (phantom undo steps, cascade tier loss, snap overwriting undo). Use only for diagnosing conflicts with other addons or recovering from an undo-related crash

preferences.name: sync_automerge
preferences.label: Auto-Merge
preferences.description: Mirror the auto-merge toggle and threshold distance across all scenes

preferences.name: sync_lock_object_mode
preferences.label: Lock Object Mode
preferences.description: Mirror the lock-object-mode toggle across all scenes

preferences.name: sync_mirror
preferences.label: Mirror Axes
preferences.description: Mirror the object-mode mirror X/Y/Z toggles across all scenes

preferences.name: sync_proportional
preferences.label: Proportional Edit
preferences.description: Mirror proportional edit toggle, falloff, connected, and projected modes across all scenes

preferences.name: sync_snap
preferences.label: Snap Settings
preferences.description: Mirror snap toggle, target, elements, align rotation, absolute grid, and snap-to-self across all scenes

preferences.name: sync_transform
preferences.label: Transform Orientation + Pivot
preferences.description: Mirror transform orientation, pivot point, and the Options popover Affect-Only toggles (Origins / Locations / Parents)

preferences.name: sync_uv
preferences.label: UV Options
preferences.description: Mirror UV-related edit options across all scenes (Live Unwrap, UV Sync Selection)

preferences.name: viewport_sync_enabled
preferences.label: Enable Viewport Sync
preferences.description: Master toggle for viewport tool settings sync. When off, no msgbus subscriptions are active and no propagation happens
